chapter_title.en: Chapter on Companions in Travel and the Obligation of Mutual Rights Among Them

text: 2440 - وَ رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ كَانَ يَقُولُ : «اِصْحَبْ مَنْ تَتَزَيَّنُ بِهِ وَ لاَ تَصْحَبْ مَنْ يَتَزَيَّنُ بِكَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2440 - Ishaq ibn Jarir narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Accompany those who add to your virtue, and do not accompany those who seek to gain virtue from you."
